title: Bridge Essay: Cognitive load and autonomic response patterns under negative priming demand in

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual awareness.

**Cognitive load and autonomic response patterns under negative priming demand in depersonalization-derealization disorder.** — Eur J Neurosci. PMID: 26791018. DOI: 10.1111/ejn.13183. Previous studies have yielded evidence for cognitive processing abnormalities and alterations of autonomic functioning in depersonalization-derealization disorder (DPRD). However, multimodal neuroimaging and psychophysiology studies have not yet been conducted to test for functional and effective connectivity under cognitive stress in patients with DPRD.
